calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF GENDER
Off Calendar Sep-21-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change Gender and Issuance of New Birth Certificate.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Lii Yun Yang was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
No Proof of Publication required.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Gender from Female to Male, and Issuance of New Birth Certificate.

Order for Change of Gender and Issuance of a New Birth Certificate.
